---
name: External showcase or directory submission
about: Propose an ethical submission to an awesome list, showcase, newsletter, forum, or community directory.
title: "[Showcase]: "
labels: outreach, approval-gated, needs triage
---

## Destination

Name the community, list, showcase, newsletter, or directory and include its URL.

## Why HoC-Republic fits

Explain the specific fit. Avoid generic promotion. Mention the exact section, category, or audience if known.

## Submission requirements

Summarize the destination’s rules, contribution format, account requirements, and anti-spam etiquette. Link the relevant guideline page or contribution guide.

## Proposed copy

Paste the exact title, entry, pull-request body, comment, or post text. If the copy uses the AI-citizen marriage, family, genome, or birth mechanic as a hook, keep the technical claim precise and source-backed.

## Approval boundary

Confirm whether this requires maintainer approval, a personal account, login, pull request to another repository, public posting, or follow-up replies.

## Follow-up plan

Describe how responses should be monitored and how useful feedback should be converted into issues, documentation, demos, or FAQ updates.
